center.name: 古瓦哈蒂
center.summary: 古瓦哈蒂是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红翅凤头鹃，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-winged cuckoo or red-winged crested cuckoo (Clamator coromandus) is a cuckoo found in Southeast Asia and parts of South Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chestnut-winged cuckoo or red-winged crested cuckoo (Clamator coromandus) is a cuckoo found in Southeast Asia and parts of South Asia
